## What & why

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If schemas changed, `npm run build:schemas` was run and the generated
      files are committed (CI fails on drift)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      (the release is automated from them)
